Among Impostor

Among Impostor is an exciting web browser game inspired by the popular multiplayer deception game Among Us. In this thrilling experience, you will be part of a crew. All the crewmates are busy diligently completing their tasks. But here is the twist: someone is there to kick it up a notch.

Play Among Impostor Online

Loading game...
About Among Impostor

Among Impostor is an exciting web browser game inspired by the popular multiplayer deception game Among Us. In this thrilling experience, you will be part of a crew. All the crewmates are busy diligently completing their tasks. But here is the twist: someone is there to kick it up a notch. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Among Impostor in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Action game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Among Impostor for free?

Yes. Among Impostor is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Among Impostor?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
